name: HTTP 请求
description: 使用 requests 库发送 HTTP GET 请求
script:
# HTTP 请求示例
import requests

url = inputs.get('url', 'https://httpbin.org/get')
params = inputs.get('params', {})

try:
    response = requests.get(url, params=params, timeout=10)
    outputs['status_code'] = response.status_code
    outputs['content'] = response.text[:500]  # 限制长度
    outputs['headers'] = dict(response.headers)
except Exception as e:
    outputs['error'] = str(e)
